title: carthamus tenuis
intro: Carthamus tenuis, also known as False Safflower, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Carthamus tenuis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its potential benefits.
